notes: Spec 38 promoted the inline security note into a top-level `## Security model` section per the spec 36 template and wrapped `gh pr view --json url,title,body` output in `<untrusted_pr_body>` boundary tags. W011 is heuristic on `gh pr view` and persists regardless of mitigations. BASELINE NEEDS USER VERIFICATION — run `bash evals/security/scan.sh --update-baselines --confirm` (requires SNYK_TOKEN) to capture the real local scanner output.
